name: handoff
description: AirDrop-style context handoff and interactive team coordination for Claude Code sessions in cmux

skills.name: send
skills.description: Send context to another Claude Code session

skills.name: register
skills.description: Register this session for handoff discovery

skills.name: team
skills.description: Create and manage interactive teams with shared messaging and tasks

skills.name: bridge
skills.description: Connect this session to an existing team as an external member
